name: Small Bin Labels 3pk Black - Brightroom™
description:
Label small bins, boxes and more conveniently with the 3-Pack of Small Bin Labels from Brightroom™. This black label pack is designed in a rectangular shape with a black frame and a clear space to label, making it easy to identify the contents. Made of metal, this bin label pack is excellent for everyday use.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
